About Us

Nvidia Technologies is a multidisciplinary tech consultancy specializing in AI-powered surveillance, academic research support, and custom software development.

Founded by cybersecurity researcher Kolade Ayanwuyi, our mission is to bridge real-world challenges with intelligent, research-backed solutions across security, education, and enterprise systems.

Learn More About Us

Our Services

AI Surveillance Systems

Deploy intelligent camera networks with real-time threat detection, anomaly alerts, and smart analytics.

Get Started

Academic Research Support

Guidance for theses, technical reports, and research-based system design, cybersecurity, and IT.

Consult Us

Software & Web Solutions

Custom web platforms, mobile apps, and secure systems for business, education, and research.

Projects

Blockchain & Automation

Payment APIs, token validation, and automation workflows using blockchain and smart contract tech.

Learn More

Why Choose Us

Our foundation is built on strong, secure, and scalable technology infrastructure — just like our services.

At Nvidia Technologies, we combine research-driven problem-solving with real-world application. Whether you need advanced security, academic support, or custom system development — we deliver with expertise, precision, and integrity.

Our Projects

AI Waste Prediction

Flood Waste Forecasting Using LSTM + SVM

Deep Learning Model

Hybrid LSTM-SVM model to predict post-flood waste types and support emergency cleanup planning

3D Feature Extraction

Flood Waste Classification with 3D-Wavelet + SVM

Consulting Project

Used 3D-Wavelet Transform and Support Vector Machine for accurate flood waste classification

Hotels & Tours Platform

Review Portal with booking, payment workflows, Invite-Only Access

Hotels & Tours

User authentication, booking workflows, and admin control panel

Perfect Fit Solution

Virtual fitting AI-Powered Body Scanning for Fashion

Smart Fitting

Designing custom body measurements with OpenCV, Meshroom, OpenMVG & TensorFlow for bespoke fashion

E-learning

IELTS Tutor LMS: Study Portal with Audio & Quiz

Web Platform

200+ materials, login system & mobile-responsive UI

Blockchain Tools

Crypto Signal Portal: Payment Validation + Discord

Fintech Automation

Integrates Blockchain API & Discord invites post-payment

Let’s help you solve real-world problems with AI, research-driven innovation, and custom-built systems. Fill out the form below and we’ll get back to you within 24 hours.

Meet the Founder

Kolade Ayanwuyi is a cybersecurity researcher and systems consultant with expertise in AI surveillance, academic research development, and full-stack solution architecture. As Founder & COO of Nvidia Technologies, he blends innovation with implementation—bridging academic insight with real-world impact across security, education, and enterprise software.

Kolade Ayanwuyi
Founder & COO – Nvidia Technologies
